'''vavaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nychthemeron|nychthemeron]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nychthemeron|nychthemeron]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vavaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || vævæbæth || vævæbæj || vævæbæsh || vævæbæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || vavavabath || vavavabaj || vavavabash || vavavaba
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || vavabath || vavabaj || vavabash || vavaba
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || vavafbafth || vavafbafj || vavafbafsh || vavafbaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || vavabatha || vavabaja || vavabasha || vavabaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || vavabath || vavabaj || vavabash || vavaba
|-
| [[Possessive]] || vavabathal || vavabajal || vavabashal || vavabakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || vavabaathatha || vavabaajaja || vavabaashasha || vavabaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || vavabathan || vavabajan || vavabashan || vavabakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || vavabathaoro || vavabajaoro || vavabashaoro || vavabakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
